message: WMI-1 shared-state divergence (signal-set-unchecked): '__net_timestamp' sets signal field '(unnamed class/struct/union).mono_delivery_time', which a different component branches on to reinterpret the object — a candidate ungoverned signal. [mechanism:unchecked-signal-field-set;indicates=WMI-1] [mem:struct=(unnamed class/struct/union);field=mono_delivery_time;offset=1] [oracle:assert=(unnamed class/struct/union).mono_delivery_time stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs;assume=producer sets mono_delivery_time without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant]
